title: Vedākṣha Astrological Graph Ontology
description: Property graph ontology for astronomical and astrological chart data
copyright: © 2026 ArthIQ Labs LLC. All rights reserved.

nodeTypes.name: Chart
nodeTypes.description: Root node representing a computed astrological chart

nodeTypes.name: Planet
nodeTypes.description: A celestial body placed in the chart

nodeTypes.name: Sign
nodeTypes.description: A zodiac sign (global, shared across charts)

nodeTypes.name: House
nodeTypes.description: An astrological house in the chart

nodeTypes.name: Nakshatra
nodeTypes.description: A Vedic lunar mansion (global, shared across charts)

nodeTypes.name: Pada
nodeTypes.description: A quarter division of a nakshatra

nodeTypes.name: Pattern
nodeTypes.description: An astrological pattern (Grand Trine, T-Square, etc.)

nodeTypes.name: DashaPeriod
nodeTypes.description: A period in the Vimshottari or other dasha system

nodeTypes.name: FixedStar
nodeTypes.description: A fixed star from the Hipparcos catalog (global)

edgeTypes.name: PLACED_IN
edgeTypes.description: Planet is placed in a zodiac sign

edgeTypes.name: RULES
edgeTypes.description: Planet rules (is domicile lord of) a sign

edgeTypes.name: CUSP_OF
edgeTypes.description: House cusp falls in a sign

edgeTypes.name: DASHA_LORD
edgeTypes.description: Dasha period is ruled by a planet

dataClassification.description: Classification propagates to all emitted nodes for GDPR/DPDP compliance
